steps.t: One of the guards at the entrance to Lake-town might be able to tell you more about the last days of Esgaroth, before the dragon Smaug was defeated. O…
One of the guards at the entrance to Lake-town might be able to tell you more about the last days of Esgaroth, before the dragon Smaug was defeated. O…
Lóskarl is the oldest resident of Lake-town, and he might be able to tell you what he remembers of the death of Smaug. Várthrek told you that Lóskarl …
Lóskarl told you there were Raft-elves present when Bilbo and the dwarves came to Lake-town, and if they are still alive they might be able to tell yo…
You learned that a number of Raft-elves were present at Esgaroth when the dwarves and Bilbo arrived to reclaim the Lonely Mountain. If you can find so…
Celethros is somewhere near the dungeons of Felegoth, in Eryn Lasgalen.
Bilbo Baggins is in the Hall of Fire, in Rivendell.
